flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Heritage University are 22% below the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($49.4k vs $63.3k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Heritage University fell 21% between 2021 and 2024 (71.9% → 56.8%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Heritage University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($18.5k → $20.9k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Heritage University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($18.5k → $20.9k).
